text.font-family: Trebuchet MS, Arial Black, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: A useful repository should show the problem, the path taken, the result, and the next thing
to improve. I do not want code to become file storage without context.
The goal is not to make every repository look finished. The goal is to make the direction
readable, so future work can start from evidence instead of memory.
problem -> path -> result -> limitation -> next attempt
